title: Prosaptia whartoniana
taxonomy: Prosaptia whartoniana is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This species is native to Australia and is a type of fern. It belongs to the genus Prosaptia, which is a group of ferns found in Australia and New Guinea. The classification of Prosaptia whartoniana places it within the class Polypodiopsida, which includes various types of ferns. Further classification includes the division Pteridophyta and the kingdom Plantae.
